SELECT ?s, bif:st_mmin(?o) AS ?mmin FROM <http://geo-api-demo/> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o . FILTER(bif:st_mmin(?o) != "BOX(0 0, 3 5)") };
SELECT ?s, bif:st_mmin(?o) AS ?mmin FROM <http://geo-api-demo/> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o . FILTER(BOUND(?mmin)) };
SELECT ?s, bif:st_mmin(?o) AS ?mmin FROM <http://geo-api-demo/> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o . VALUES ?o { <box1> <point2d> } };
SELECT ?s, bif:st_mmin(?o) AS ?mmin FROM <http://geo-api-demo/> WHERE { { SELECT ?s ?o WHERE { ?s ?p ?o . FILTER(STR(?s) = "http://geo-api-demo/box1") } } };
SELECT ?s, bif:st_mmin(?shape) AS ?mmin FROM <http://geo-api-demo/> WHERE { ?s ?p ?shape . OPTIONAL { ?s <shapeType> ?type . FILTER(?type = <http://www.openlinksw.com/schemas/virtrdf#Geometry>) } };
